name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,
As our country copes with the events of the last two weeks, I hope that you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy. Though we are in the midst of tumultuous times, I believe that the future of our Nation is as bright as ever. We live in the greatest country in the world, and we are capable of reconciling our differences and protecting the promise of the American dream for our generation and that of our children.
I began the week by visiting with members of the Houston Police Department. Our Nation is coping with widespread grief and violence, and the brave men and women of HPD have made tireless efforts to protect our communities.

On Wednesday, I re-released my video [Chains](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e68c1f9052e94f6788d8acd6b9c4d27b&_e=wVBnsnsKwXa81mY8wUOx_YiK9YKY1W8aahfiGbbotDGsQvse_dizhMB7_VOC-Rspoh1MCEHaEB2RUsju1nVDMwdWNlAUPg3itLKA5kKOqVVaPnsaFRE0iH-ATnCy_d9sMJDca5END7AHYuSIR5VGpSnZa6mNTt8nbyOAQpsMiuQG8qMqzCRI-6oFY8cJLm8mdDiGU7R7yAaEd3Hc6sHKAigo5azfeDJA9GDbnvPAEZ-RlzPV6xFlEA2kfQHTAmWNRnmxY6gPY2wzu0ENd8-b5TUX_8qcp0TeOy191rHo6L0%3D) to put forward a unifying message of hope and perseverance. Now, more than ever, we need leadership that will bring people together and remind us of the great opportunities and freedoms sustained by our founding principles. We must make sure that our values of life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness guide our country into the next generation.
On Friday morning, I joined [Fox & Friends](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e68c1f9052e94f6788d8acd6b9c4d27b&_e=wVBnsnsKwXa81mY8wUOx_SMZI3ITBeMHrSKb-mLvzhANHa3sERxgWxhB-FPuCHobJ3fOWNtaCPFO4s42cr8klpAwcwoVQuWR9a1tvvPvonMk7hk9zghnblY28mDN5eh9klTFbH8Xy6UnX0D0BVRCX8y93Sf6VitnaXcU-LnxvMXDqc5PdABz1g6tdkHxeX1BNhIFf51TwRB2Byulz7Q38aCcHrfw8R6Rj95ctTGzosprZapLK_DkPPSBvzGtGb-A-eg6OByOBUzQXZ6DmzALMkRkkgiZzByzj8WUGnGFo_I%3D) to expand on my background and amplify my belief that we can forge a brighter path for the next generation if we are willing to work together.

**ICYMI** : On Friday, the Houston Chronicle published the following article exploring my story and some of the values are shaping my campaign: [Houston GOP congressional candidate Wesley Hunt delves into family's slavery roots in ad](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e68c1f9052e94f6788d8acd6b9c4d27b&_e=wVBnsnsKwXa81mY8wUOx_frH2Rj8Wuh24VK4i30te-VxGVwb5XMCNxan6R3lhmfGhgsUDW66HMCWmCWpPwDyFjyjZoZbqSsRUqLp6TEyfo6zLywbyKiGXP_Nc2DIrl0o-Jtx0yiVYLRTEdxeheB55j5YNCCOFIbJ16faxPxy8Qlv_iX9RTujJypwXPrMH96ljj-HC0tmruvhrAA8S3i3Pash1P0SMd84swf7Kirp-sSS1rK-14vj5CGxoD6TdYMIL0yfy75ZDmj1HdMWlLLLmgYsm_69BNWha4NH4KP0d6NsD6KOSQvFbPKSgk-iMmcZGRyGkIiFesPkCb9mAJDxucRpDoezNCLy92eBhd2jxOIzSO0Bl2NCS-lo-abvryXS)
I look forward to building upon our shared principles throughout my campaign, and then delivering upon them in Congress. Together, I am confident that we can protect the American Dream for future generations.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e68c1f9052e94f6788d8acd6b9c4d27b&_e=wVBnsnsKwXa81mY8wUOx_d-hb1LvmgA4YWxVYs8fgMT0EvvvBJPeYykLznxnGvC83AWGI3Kz0r6H9aqdZodjkyXRVkJIzHeD5Okc8D9wRA8kp5kCPxx2DYp_N2I4qyjTQpCvW74FjpNvCXkgnjfnzyqJ-DusRBFNRp3edE2Qo14sqwrmoVuezZVKWMM_AAMoVTVEqqASOxRV6OZk1GnCwxk-XPSRqH1pT1oaG0WkYx7-raJoIGo531faocDETIvFEyCKSm3QmBnBSyGm6sS9jzuE97l4ofQl1UL_gGg1WHg%3D)****
---

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=e68c1f9052e94f6788d8acd6b9c4d27b&_t=AqwAhKvjiKDNbVoT4FIbhYSquhSrBgGD6MIEHYx8D6Lek8ZY3jzPstnSTXLiaYR34J5XEzG2UfYyptzkgOt6_MUYK0qVvgpmJyP0Q9JOK1TLe5DGZYLZMItvDgzLEUT0qNfa6MRdabu8-QzOW8ft93RgMUM-j76uKUMib5hLsC8%3D).

The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

Dear Friend, Inevitably, this election was going to be a referendum on President Trump. His administration's abject failure in dealing with the triple crisis of an historic pandemic, the ensuing economic meltdown, and a social justice upheaval have only crystalized that fact. name: Caroline Musumarra
subject: Support Serve America endorsee, Francis Conole (NY-24)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend can you attend?
Good Morning,

Please join Congressman Moulton and Serve America PAC for a fundraiser in support of Serve America endorsee, Francis Conole (NY-24), this **[Thursday, June 11th at 7:00 PM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17784604/206559293/1318758820?refcode2=b7187db7-8ba9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzE4N2RiNy04YmE5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRTcKaANcE10KDgqpu7kxtL1PmIfygkuVaeKkkthgVc=).**

Running in New York’s 24th Congressional District, Francis is a public servant through and through -- he’s defended our freedom in the United States Navy and now he’s running to represent Central New York in the House. We know he’s got what it takes to win, and it’s why Serve America proudly endorsed his campaign. In this time of crisis, it's clear that the country needs leaders who will put people over party and that's exactly the type of leader Francis is.

We’d obviously prefer for this event to be in-person so you could see first hand how impressive of a candidate Francis is but, for right now, virtual gatherings are still the safest and most effective way to network. I’m excited for you to join us and support Francis in his race to be the next Congressman from New York’s 24th Congressional District and bring a new generation of service to Washington.

Please join us this **[Thursday, June 11th at 7:00 PM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17784605/206559294/1318758820?refcode2=b7187db7-8ba9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzE4N2RiNy04YmE5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRTcKaANcE10KDgqpu7kxtL1PmIfygkuVaeKkkthgVc=)****** and hear directly from Francis on why his race is so important and why he has what it takes to flip this Republican stronghold from Red to Blue and bring change to Washington.

To RSVP, visit the link [**here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17784606/206559295/1318758820?refcode2=b7187db7-8ba9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzE4N2RiNy04YmE5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRTcKaANcE10KDgqpu7kxtL1PmIfygkuVaeKkkthgVc=) or email me at [Caroline@SethMoulton.com](mailto:Caroline@SethMoulton.com). I can’t wait to have you join us on Thursday!

Best,
Caroline

PS. If you can’t join but want to learn more about Francis and the other Serve America endorsees, please feel free to reach out to me or our National Political Director, Craig Harrington [(Craig@SethMoulton.com)](mailto:craig@sethmoulton.com). We’d be more than happy to set up a call and talk through the candidates and why your support is so vital especially in the current political environment!

Paid for by Serve America PAC
Serve America PAC
PO Box 2013
Salem, MA 01970
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/145869ed-88a9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74/b7187db7-8ba9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzE4N2RiNy04YmE5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRTcKaANcE10KDgqpu7kxtL1PmIfygkuVaeKkkthgVc=&id=100807537).

body:
| |

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17786212/206590519/-2040532?refcode=em060820-header&refcode2=034f1ad1-98a9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzRmMWFkMS05OGE5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ycsLmUVecgXvVobKpiC5a7v633N7w_-52gHOEsMx4s=) **** | | Friend, this is a moment for strong moral leadership from those we elect to serve us in public office.

Teresa’s experience uniting Georgians, standing up to hate, and leading with integrity as a mayor is why she is the leader we need in the United States Senate.

As the first mayor to win re-election in decades in a majority Black city, **Teresa banned the display of the Confederate flag on public property after the racist rally in Charlottesville, Virginia in 2017.** She has stood up to hate in office, and has a plan for a New Civic and Economic Infrastructure to achieve justice and equity for Black Americans. She will fight to end the qualified immunity provision that keeps police officers from being held accountable for the police brutality that has incited mass protests across the country.

[**We need moral leadership right now. With Georgia’s primary less than 24 hours away, will you join me by supporting Teresa’s campaign? Please make a donation today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17786213/206590520/-2040532?refcode=em060820-mlk&refcode2=034f1ad1-98a9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzRmMWFkMS05OGE5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ycsLmUVecgXvVobKpiC5a7v633N7w_-52gHOEsMx4s=) | | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

This week, we are asking you to continue to promote the [Second Opinion Project ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTYwLTk4YTcxYTBkM2RmZDQ5YTg4ZTI0MjA2NDIwOGU0M2Vk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2Vjb25kb3BpbmlvbnByb2plY3QuY29tL3NpZ24zOTYxMDUwMD9taWQ9NDIxNTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=D5wUIQuTRBTYtQX__1urFQ)because we know that the excessive lockdowns created an environment that Antifa and others were able to take advantage of, as they pursue their real objective of overthrowing American civil society and the Constitution. Furthermore, politicians who stand by and allow the rioting are still prohibiting law-abiding Americans from attending church or reopening their businesses.

_One quick note:_ We’ve heard from some of you that you are not on any social media and so you can’t share videos and petitions and other items. I just wanted to assure you that if you share links over email to your friends and family, it is just as effective and important as sharing on social media. We are going to make it easier for those of you who are only sharing over email to copy and paste the link into an email. Sometimes we will specifically need a social media post to be shared, and for those action items, if you do not do social media, you can simply copy and paste the link for those posts into an email. At the end of the day, we are just so thankful for whatever actions you are able to take. Thank you!
|

**SECOND OPINION PROJECT LETTER**
1. **If you’re a doctor** , [read this letter to President Trump](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTYwLTk4YTcxYTBkM2RmZDQ5YTg4ZTI0MjA2NDIwOGU0M2Vk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2Vjb25kb3Bpbmlvbi1sZXR0ZXI_bWlkPTQyMTU5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=VV38GE24s8RrPuYS-rG-Ug) about how our country needs a second opinion and how the so-called “experts” are not always right. You will have an opportunity to **sign the letter** after you have finished reading it. Please also share this with other doctors you know.
2. **If you are not a doctor** , but would like to ask doctors you know to sign the letter, **use the invitation we have provided to ask your doctor to sign the letter**. The text of the invitation and the letter, itself, have been [posted online for you to use](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTYwLTk4YTcxYTBkM2RmZDQ5YTg4ZTI0MjA2NDIwOGU0M2Vk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTU%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2Vjb25kb3Bpbmlvbi1sZXR0ZXItcmVxdWVzdD9taWQ9NDIxNTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=ukcUgoruh69JuJ6J2KCqHQ).
3. **Everyone[sign this letter to President Trump](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTYwLTk4YTcxYTBkM2RmZDQ5YTg4ZTI0MjA2NDIwOGU0M2Vk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTY%3A%3AaHR0cDovL2xuay50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9tLzEvNDkxMDk0ODkvMDItYjIwMTU3LTc2NmFjOTVlNWFhZDQxOTliODZiMWUzNTBmZjI2ZDY0Lzg5LzkyMC8zNTY1ODI4OS1mYTRjLTQ5NjEtOGU5ZC1mZGI0ZjZkYzRkMDE_bWlkPTQyMTU5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=90bDyeAab3sHhHWlAwMnUQ) about revising the CDC’s reopening guidelines for schools.** The doctors we have been working with for the Second Opinion Project support a revision to these guidelines as they are onerous, unworkable, and unnecessary.

|
---
**DONATE TO THE SECOND OPINION PROJECT**
The continued and excessive lockdowns created an atmosphere and environment that made it much easier for Antifa and other radical left-wing groups to implement their existing plans of destruction, violence, and mayhem. And, while local and state politicians stand back and allow rioters to control the streets, they are STILL prohibiting law-abiding Americans from attending church or opening their businesses.

This is why it is so important that our doctors are heard, because too many politicians and “experts” are exploiting the current situation to continue to deprive us of our rights. And that’s why, if you are able to support this project with a financial gift, you can help us make sure the doctors’ voices are elevated and heard. [Any amount will help!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTYwLTk4YTcxYTBkM2RmZDQ5YTg4ZTI0MjA2NDIwOGU0M2Vk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTc%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2ZvdW5kYXRpb24ub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8_bWlkPTQyMTU5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=ZKjd0pjXhbwmVhIIEs1VvQ)
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

| **“With Steve King Gone, Does the Democrat Have a Shot in His Iowa District?”
\-- The New York Times**
---

Peter,

In 2018, the establishment counted us out.

They thought J.D. didn’t even have a shot in Iowa’s 4th district.

**But we proved them wrong. Our people-powered campaign came within 3 points of beating a long-time incumbent in a district won by Trump by 27 points. This year, we finally took down that incumbent -- Steve King.**

Iowa’s 4th District has _always_ been written off by the GOP and by establishment Democrats. It looks like those pundits across the country haven’t learned their lesson and are again counting us out.

**Time and again, we have proven them wrong. And that’s what we’ll do this November, when we defeat Randy Feenstra and elect J.D. Scholten to Congress.**

**[Chip in right now to put us in the best position possible to flip this seat. name: Josh Hawley
subject: I endorse Sean Parnell!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
We cannot afford a Democrat majority in the House again this coming fall. It is imperative that we flip the House **We cannot afford a Democrat majority in the House again this coming fall.** It is imperative that we flip the House to put an end to Pelosi’s power trip, and restore Congress with people that will help President Trump continue making this country better for the people! We have been struggling with the socialist agenda for far too long. **That’s why I am reaching out to officially announce my endorsement of Sean Parnell, the Republican candidate for Pennsylvania’s 17th Congressional District.** Sean is exactly the kind of energetic, devoted, conservative leader we need in Washington. | |
---
[ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d2157dd2d6964a0cbe3305700d6202da&_e=TVzfEKo7Xo_eXC_STDliv-GWqz0beQjj7A9g9ADkA6rHSHo65yAXziJ7Nj1iq7nwOIC5s758lx2XZTgdU3pf_7y1pADxu0hwyAKv-EuvHUzsWnpsLoUIFZhUmKNm2Mf2LuoEvh1rX-wConQotFrAf8wZy-qrYA43o9eNmfrsjpPUk9mBDTEpJgJevVPfy-c7WbtYiz1VHJ3JsdMi_mXjUNNhFr21lochMPJwAv8y2zhTZP0ZtrEfsj4G_Vm2J4OGIXFomdSj-6fLcXcbmicX-KDRhOkmYkVsjip7Us9zVcRbe7jdBCK158BJpIaEVt5nyWWpyGgsASCMROuUhrWEM26sZOdbxy7lWpT24m-U_sjQFDcFEcHKoi0G0XF_FytH5XiO4gajbzhAFxmimtzFZGIS_Ri9VPtgmA8XBoDs_tw%3D)
**_Sean Parnell — Republican candidate for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District_**
|

With elections on the horizon, it is more important now than ever for the Republican Party to continue uniting around the voice of the people of our country to ensure strong, conservative leaders are sent to Washington. **Your continued support for Republican candidates during this election season is crucial for ensuring a successful RED majority in the House!**
[**Chip in $25 NOW to Flip the House and Fire Pelosi**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d2157dd2d6964a0cbe3305700d6202da&_e=TVzfEKo7Xo_eXC_STDliv-GWqz0beQjj7A9g9ADkA6rHSHo65yAXziJ7Nj1iq7nwOIC5s758lx2XZTgdU3pf_7y1pADxu0hwyAKv-EuvHUzsWnpsLoUIFZhUmKNm2Mf2LuoEvh1rX-wConQotFrAf8wZy-qrYA43o9eNmfrsjpPUk9mBDTEpJgJevVPfy-c7WbtYiz1VHJ3JsdMi_mXjUL32k2yQEKshf0HATNJEMOoQlyNJ01gidlWX2HfnsQIxh3-k_u9-PsNG-nyKGAdmrv3yYM_Gq9VjAnmsYurBaHhbUo1oWjP2UvDnmzV3xclY-1RiEz1At_JGhaIp636tAzwwYjmgzoeM3R3TXGLEDmSqDxpgZytMospOiGceBgvrhCC5XvEWqk3c-M9AzqqU1CGFcxeWFdlIAEhAG-Bu8yk%3D)
As a decorated combat veteran, New York Times best-selling author, and father, Sean Parnell loves our country deeply. I have no doubt he will fight to ensure the people’s voice is heard in Congress.

**Sean is a natural leader** , and he has the strength and courage to stop the socialist agenda in the House and deliver growth and job opportunities for the people of this country. **With President Trump’s complete and total endorsement** , I know Sean is the best candidate for the job.
[ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d2157dd2d6964a0cbe3305700d6202da&_e=TVzfEKo7Xo_eXC_STDliv-GWqz0beQjj7A9g9ADkA6rHSHo65yAXziJ7Nj1iq7nwOIC5s758lx2XZTgdU3pf_7y1pADxu0hwyAKv-EuvHUzsWnpsLoUIFZhUmKNm2Mf2LuoEvh1rX-wConQotFrAf8wZy-qrYA43o9eNmfrsjpPUk9mBDTEpJgJevVPfy-c7WbtYiz1VHJ3JsdMi_mXjUP4x6Z6LMZ7WC0XL9JF8EeDWHky-u-U4cpY8A2LxSkcOkd6T-SIrdQqIttg0KwQMOCXdgnogmn5MFXPseKiPzvwbLdmljwpd7d5FFS-KoQhzIQ5Ek-e68gbsjXAq6A5y57FwgYNWIN-_H7IbWjdzvmL7GgFHyhC04gs6TU9mXjXAgWToXDcYbowGQ8coxpMkdK08BQubPimRfmKGoTC4Hdc%3D)
Sean is a passionate citizen who loves this country unconditionally. He will fight for you with the same vigor that he fought for our country in combat.

**_Please stand with me to help elect conservative veteran Sean Parnell to office and flip the house RED!_**
[ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d2157dd2d6964a0cbe3305700d6202da&_e=TVzfEKo7Xo_eXC_STDliv-GWqz0beQjj7A9g9ADkA6rHSHo65yAXziJ7Nj1iq7nwOIC5s758lx2XZTgdU3pf_7y1pADxu0hwyAKv-EuvHUzsWnpsLoUIFZhUmKNm2Mf2LuoEvh1rX-wConQotFrAf8wZy-qrYA43o9eNmfrsjpPUk9mBDTEpJgJevVPfy-c7WbtYiz1VHJ3JsdMi_mXjUMn25qC0lwpRpzB-M3vUlfpOE2Hieil0ml1_AsrcA4OstV26idoe7LaBPPXPRvFIygJZK3riUuJLL1s03UewA41t-lAZsZYl4OKicFIfXvaxZxXS1KzTR89LaaYA2-NTrPot3pXLJv6VVr1KpGEWdqUlpXnLQnUBTSI9ozXuZh7nhILVviYswc4uSRzqt9Kl7d6oRCQJ2ANVIGuuSQ3vo4U%3D)

name: Sandra Sepulveda
subject: New Sponsors: Slay the Dragon: Movie Screening & Panel Discussion
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/poster-thmb.jpg]

Dear Peter,

There are still spots available! Reserve your ticket now!

A secretive, high-tech gerrymandering initiative launched 10 years ago continues to undermine our democracy. SLAY THE DRAGON , a new and timely documentary film about gerrymandering in the United States, follows everyday people, outraged by what they see as an attack on the core democratic principle that every person’s vote should count equally.

As another round of redistricting approaches in Tennessee, the TNDP is hosting a virtual movie screening of SLAY THE DRAGON . We will watch the film together and then following the film, facilitate a panel discussion.

SLAY THE DRAGON MOVIE SCREENING
&
POST-FILM PANEL DISCUSSION
with Special Guests
Barak Goodman & Chris Durrance
Slay the Dragon Film Directors

Kendra Lee
Redistricting fellow for the Memphis A. Philip Randolph Institute

Garrett Arwa
Director of Campaigns, National Democratic Redistricting Committee

Shehn Datta
Deputy States Director, National Democratic Redistricting Committee

Wednesday, June 10th, 2020
5:30 CT
Zoom Conference

Tickets: $25.00
Sponsorships: $100 & up
Buy a Ticket or Sponsor the Screening Now! [https://tndp.org/slaythedragon/]

Thank you to our sponsors!

TURQUOISE BLUE ($250)
John Bridges
Lisa & John Campbell
Mark & Becky Harmon

AQUA BLUE ($100)
Shanice Oliver
Gary & Caroline Shockley
Jackie Shrago
Cynthia M. Whitlow
Matt Wiltshire

Purchase a sponsorship online [https://tndp.org/slaythedragon/] or contact Sandra Sepulveda at sandra@tndp.org or 615-327-9779
SPONSORSHIPS AVAILABLE
TRUE BLUE ($2,500)
CERULEAN BLUE ($1,500)
MARINE BLUE ($1000)
CORNFLOWER BLUE ($500)
TURQUOISE BLUE ($250)
AQUA BLUE ($100)

##

PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

body:

Here's your link: **[https://warnockforgeorgia.com/d-cust/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e424/288179be/b066a3c/348ebb6f/3344300668/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjcxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk271-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
---
Reverend Warnock reached out because he's seen what our grassroots movement can do when we all stand behind a common cause - and that's what it's going to take to win this election. **We can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate but not if we fall short of critical goals like this.**
**We're 97.4% of the way there, and we need your urgent help to get to 100% by midnight _tonight. _Please, friend, will you give right now to hit this goal and flip the Senate? Your link is here again: ****[https://warnockforgeorgia.com/d-cust/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e424/288179be/b066a3c/348ebb6f/3344300668/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjcxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk271-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks so much,

Alex
Warnock for Georgia
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Reverend Warnock
Date: Sat, June 6, 2020
Subject: I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth
| | |
---
Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become one of the Flip the Senate Members we need in our fight to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats. **But first, let me explain why your support is so important - and what will happen if we fall short.**
I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But, from there, I went on to earn a college degree, and worked my way up to serving as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I have the chance to become the first black senator this state has _ever_ elected.
But the truth is, the opportunities that made my journey possible - from Kayton Homes to Dr. King's pulpit - are growing further and further out of reach for too many people across this country. I'm running for Senate to change that, but I can't win without help of grassroots supporters like you.
**That 's why I'm asking: [Friend, will you chip in before midnight to become a Flip the Senate Member of our campaign - so we can flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and build a country in which _everyone_ , no matter who you are or where you come from, has a shot at the American dream?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e424/288179be/b066a3c/348ebb6f/3344300668/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjcxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk271-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e424/288179be/b066a3c/348ebb6f/3344300668/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjcxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk271-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
The stakes have never been higher: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms that Democrats can flip the Senate - and analysts at _The Washington Post_ say that winning in Georgia is key to making it happen.
Democrats cannot take back the Senate if we lose this critical battleground state. Plain and simple. That's why Mitch McConnell and the GOP are zeroing in on our race - and why my Republican opponent has already started spending $20 million of her own money against me.
**So please, friend, this is important:[If you care about taking back the Senate for Democrats, I'm counting on you to rush $5 or more right now to become one of the 2,500 essential Flip the Senate Members we need by midnight to power forward our fight to flip Georgia blue!](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e424/288179be/b066a3c/348ebb6f/3344300668/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjcxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk271-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,

Reverend Warnock

That 's why I'm asking: "" "" The stakes have never been higher: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms that Democrats can flip the Senate - and analysts at The Washington Post say that winning in Georgia is key to making it happen. Democrats cannot take back the Senate if we lose this critical battleground state. Plain and simple. That's why Mitch McConnell and the GOP are zeroing in on our race - and why my Republican opponent has already started spending $20 million of her own money against me. So please, friend, this is important: "" Thank you, Reverend Warnock | | "" | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. "" | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031

name: Betsy Rader
subject: Change is Gonna Come
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Dear Peter: "It's been a long, a long time coming, but I know change is gonna come." These lyrics from 1964 have been rolling around in my head this week -- it feels like we've truly reached a turning point in our country's history, a turn for the better. I attended inspiring, peaceful rallies and marches organized by students throughout my District for George Floyd and racial justice, and the positive energy from such a diverse array of people gave me more hope than I have felt in the last 4 years. A spotlight is shining hard on racial injustice and gross economic disparity, and the inexcusable lack of equitable access to healthcare and education, at a time when the pandemic has made these problems even more tragic. People of all ages and races are coming to understand that we absolutely must change course in 2020. We have to stand up to those who would divide us or we risk losing the dream that is America. **As a civil rights lawyer who represents victims of employment discrimination, racial justice and access to justice have long been priorities of mine. I'm glad that I am running for State Senate during a time when**** leadership at the state level can make the crucial difference. ** **_We can_** enact criminal justice reform and take steps like changing the laws about qualified immunity for police misconduct, while also investing in effective police training and techniques for peer support and intervention. **_We can_** stop the voter purges and other means of obstructing the right to vote that disparately impact people of color. **_We can_** make sure that people earn a living wage for essential jobs that are often performed by African American workers. **_We can_** fund our K-12 education system equitably and adequately so that everyone has a chance to succeed in this state, and we can fund our colleges and universities so that students don't incur crippling student loans. Truly, there is so much we can do to make Ohio a place of opportunity for everyone. The young people organizing these rallies can see that bright future within their reach. **But we have to seize this moment and make it a reality for them. ** If you want more information about how to help with our campaign to flip State Senate District 18, please [visit our website](https://act.myngp.com/el/2t0bG5VZYFqZR4rrBaYkxYT_clS7AM7WZFRdTgZqvbE=/vyg--LTqfKu7BSwGamhJ_WgBOPIfAlz3wLTO97MmiaQ=), and please follow and share our work on [facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/2t0bG5VZYFqZR4rrBaYkxYT_clS7AM7WZFRdTgZqvbE=/MigOiquVG7JqHDRwk2vMmg9Toz19XyAD-1OQqhvhb5g=) & [twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/2t0bG5VZYFqZR4rrBaYkxYT_clS7AM7WZFRdTgZqvbE=/QyDyECi4uSN8342pfQvBQmeYeykRMQ-XUAfriGXsO3Y=). We are stronger together. Sincerely, [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2t0bG5VZYFqZR4rrBaYkxYT_clS7AM7WZFRdTgZqvbE=/6S-llxyNyQaIlCRlzdHeh71HGAt97-5QEQ0D4SLpt-Y=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2t0bG5VZYFqZR4rrBaYkxYT_clS7AM7WZFRdTgZqvbE=/kB-ZJmNQ6kBC5OCNaqweYyAwCyrS5lDpAoyLhsL78Fs=?refcode=update620) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2t0bG5VZYFqZR4rrBaYkxYT_clS7AM7WZFRdTgZqvbE=/vyg--LTqfKu7BSwGamhJ_WgBOPIfAlz3wLTO97MmiaQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2t0bG5VZYFqZR4rrBaYkxYT_clS7AM7WZFRdTgZqvbE=/Kt7ezkS3ZE10qNE9EXmD8pRI8Yqnst4Ubui6y0u5qtg=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2t0bG5VZYFqZR4rrBaYkxYT_clS7AM7WZFRdTgZqvbE=/QyDyECi4uSN8342pfQvBQmeYeykRMQ-XUAfriGXsO3Y=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2t0bG5VZYFqZR4rrBaYkxYT_clS7AM7WZFRdTgZqvbE=/MigOiquVG7JqHDRwk2vMmg9Toz19XyAD-1OQqhvhb5g=)
---

**_We are getting the exact opposite from President Trump._**

We need to know: [Do you approve of President Trump?](https://act.314actionfund.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/survey-djt/?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Do+you+approve+of+President+Trump&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_200606_1mc_none_Resnd_2_Trumpapproval&source=314_EM_SV_200606_1mc_none_Resnd_2_Trumpapproval&refcode=314_EM_SV_200606_1mc_none_Resnd_2_Trumpapproval")

Through all of this, Trump has chosen to fan the flames and divide our country at every step. **Make no mistake about it; he is wholly unfit to lead.**

This year, we have the opportunity to vote out Donald Trump and rid ourselves of his constant divisiveness.

**We at 314 are ready to vote out Donald Trump, but we still need to hear from our supporters.**

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb75a0/4bd7760e/5dc39067/77ae6e57/383548435/VEsHBg/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=13+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_200606_1mc_none_Resnd_2_Trumpapproval&source=314_EM_SV_200606_1mc_none_Resnd_2_Trumpapproval")** to make a donation.

Peter,

Thanks to our unstoppable team of over 42,000 donors (who pitch in an average online donation of just $23 at a time), Team MJ has met _every goal we 've set so far_ on this campaign.

That's not just good news, that's _fantastic_ news. **But, unfortunately, I do have to follow that news up with a bit of ... less good news.**

**We break our goals down into day-by-day and town-by-town targets, and right now, we 're behind on donations from your community.**

But we can quickly turn this bad news into good news if just 12 more people pitch in before midnight. **[Can you make a donation today? With your help, I know we can get right back on track.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901e4/7f51f7bc/4ed79592/4ef68ce5/996594746/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200608.1nd__1518__&amount=10")**

Thank you!
Taylor Klos
Texas Finance Director
MJ for Texas

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901e4/7f51f7bc/4ed79592/4ef68cdb/996594746/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

Friend,

President Trump needs your help.

subject: A surge in volunteers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Mondaire’s campaign is on a roll. In the last few weeks, we’ve been endorsed by Rep. Pramila Jayapal, Sec. Julián Castro, and now Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z0IZfSrbb6JB3qMyNklARgq7N7BdK9knAWkpIL4Xy0iImrc_fJbu9j6oXKafJX0Im7EIVKxJkV9mLJ8F0P4kUbM8DUPfyMumJNz7onT-PtWzq47bSg7k9pkmYjoaPctUZ9qbQoRRroUfiE_jADpxrm6-Mn0atJlQKtfw1fe8pSOa7LnYxlvCTkcuEn6vxf6nXSYT2XTD0yCUBcfSlXfdr89tU_ZFsT1Qy_VuDNdHlGy8P6tCM84vLCpTOxEqjG7o1Tr5njpwb4GKbCSMvrVZ-wDJXsjUyZuMmA5XIV6FUqYg/32g/hvP7-jqeSsy9KRX4jxtPBA/h0/eWS0pRW6hNh515HKpKEK1YsmfDZR5Q06g59baS9jcOw) Friend, **** **** **** Mondaire’s campaign is on a roll. In the last few weeks, we’ve been endorsed by Rep. Pramila Jayapal, Sec. Julián Castro, and now Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. This has resulted in a HUGE surge in volunteer sign-ups. Dozens of new volunteers are signing up for the campaign every single day.
Unfortunately, the dialer we use costs money, and we had not allocated this huge increase in call volume into our budget. So, for the last two weeks of the campaign, we need to seriously increase the budget for our dialer to ensure we have the best Get Out The Vote operation NY-17 has ever seen.
This is not something we had budgeted for previously, so we need to raise the money to pay for this increased volume on our dialer. This is so crucial: our field program is going to be the difference-maker in this election. **_[Can you make a donation today to help us out?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z0IZfSrbb6JB3qMyNklARgq7N7BdK9knAWkpIL4Xy0iKKAJaua-jm9Pm_YZde87ytotet5bhvGSVg-kqRpdK7GTzvjO4RNzeRWxTQGJ_6t81jarFPBd-ZskcshYXEzy76w3JFxXUU0X57KpMXPZGvsO01uNJUwceMT78W5jW4DJJWgBDvUjM01dTi-ou_OaZUial_JcShIWZQxnNzFgLXXJXilKlKEIP4-pYbEHS30_6WhT2OsuQAIM986Tjkmadd_AQLTTa0fcHr8Wc0z2s3KlxjtquP_yBP7I8YzniIvmA/32g/hvP7-jqeSsy9KRX4jxtPBA/h1/o5eGcaCeBvx3i4ZsEG9HXs-RzSYxz_7NRxQx6V49WSc)_**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z0IZfSrbb6JB3qMyNklARgq7N7BdK9knAWkpIL4Xy0iOrsNBtH2qTJ1EXEcJ8onjanonBjLULly5h3vtig70txJOoCGsO13JaeCBdfzoKWznqFmgky6an5CXJmIhbXIM-zbVSNvZVSQ55Rh8D1ElWx40CkODfccNoDMJk2n_4gXtHrshH6NdpbNRFMWIyBrwYQFT4jQ_uyPvWEBJFkFd28AdX1rP_v06csk8aKmFA9C2sSngAhLE8J6oHubmE_DhIbMypTz6IzoSq6H6-V80lY2l77YMJ5H7qVNWDAtqmNag/32g/hvP7-jqeSsy9KRX4jxtPBA/h2/gm9ghHBeTFAwCuKdMLUls-gC3Dqf-PEn54SbTHTdft8)
Other campaigns are boasting about making 10,000 calls in a week. Our volunteers made almost 19,000 calls in two hours this past Saturday. We might get outspent by our self-funding opponent who is pumping millions of dollars in Big Pharma money into his campaign, but no amount of money can buy the grassroots movement we have built.

These next two weeks won’t be easy. We’re going to be working harder than ever and asking a lot of our volunteers. But with your help, we can reach every voter we need to win on June 23rd. **_[Will you contribute right now to help us win?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z0IZfSrbb6JB3qMyNklARgq7N7BdK9knAWkpIL4Xy0iPoqB3ILiwNyuW7NrcbHnrZIwcny0MVgjN9-TgbS9lJzR552iyNP2V3EZuUeb0TDDYiQO1XfigQxHVUyw5b7DsYah_D1nQGyTr9esO6hQxKNj0rtkFFMWtMHHh9dNOqaT3wLFoczmd1jPMtGwF1DOSQkwmooNajMiq9jCowfl-9YhDuKCZ5mrl8lIiWiI46BnFPDDIxjpjnQi-vvJ8eade21sPsCQRQCdwvYua-QMOYseBWM9qVvpBto-pqs5_bKFA/32g/hvP7-jqeSsy9KRX4jxtPBA/h3/I_E3XjZms2iGdbrcdLG8jeeRzpgRaXqS_D-nFnJGFd8)_**
Maya Handa, Digital Organizing Director
[Facebook](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiIehPqLp50aR83p0fofD_ekMoj-9LY6J1vq6mntf-inGSC8pQjjKXqGSt9v5azfe-x9Ccv3RW8JjgIEYnCHzYFQ_6cE-YHT_L-jI_jzTAzxLdlP-vZSaiUhiZ4rUnOTdnaK-hiozWdl0O_t_T0QDX7VpL-jRQtByJPNheIwK-oN1L0uVs7Lgl5DRP_xXlK6xAH0hblUnQFHq_Naep9Mx5VJX2CjCX73jeZlhdMed5RGcA/32g/hvP7-jqeSsy9KRX4jxtPBA/h4/RDO_DzB3lxmBr3CfH-R1fswWqVz6J3-kFM01qVJ7-SU) | [Twitter](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhlVeQ7MpruVa0KNw2sbNX7FaHgAq4ezIjM3urw8wX5_wMxxFJvG6o5-dfCYD80qVh87-n_ipI6jiC8BnVtpXv_E56tM69eVMXA3NaodQWvKEK_gQswIYTRTUQC2odw8j38S05XMM-KY0UQEqEgKt-XfhnscX76L6oMW5xYqHVq2MlpFO5zp344Hf6gxnyuv5LJV91LdNFlhS4VkhqK0FGBmG-W0GDhCbLjvO7NbysEZN/32g/hvP7-jqeSsy9KRX4jxtPBA/h5/pPD00Z73Ei-CzMMT4bkKEg_S4Ulqbj4rS-NSOMRV6j8) | [Instagram](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7SChrnF8iSfFHczcmiKgbnUWZTUvLGmwjW-PhNAaZDq1V4MVyCKvPXZLKrz5rE5HP2pJ9j7VWBhNa5vA1FhGUWdCjUf-bC2e7g5x5xfiEa6q2Z-8QxvMY_C60Ddwz4BWKBLOwRoLI1ZuAG50YWiesLxena40RqligQOkcTGLnzNZ_QVMtaJmVnCfwnfULQyzz-5YUBsbyeofkrTqaHPfiQfOGQnNsA4BCghj94tTSc5-g/32g/hvP7-jqeSsy9KRX4jxtPBA/h6/uVvMJSNA2mqAQcIDx8naAAH1crMmy3sStk1o6QBf2Yk)

**_Episode 11: Uncovering the Assault on President Trump with Congressman Devin Nunes_**

In this week's edition of Making the Argument, Nick welcomes Congressmen Devin Nunes. As the Chairman of the House Intelligence Committee during the first two years of the Trump presidency, Congressman Nunes led the fight against the now debunked “Russian Collusion” hoax that has been pushed by Democrats from Abigail Spanberger to Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden. Congressman Nunes has continued to lead the fight through the Mueller investigation and impeachment circus.

clean_body: Uncovering the Assault on President Trump with Congressman Devin Nunes | | Friend, The latest episode of Nick’s podcast was just released! Read below to get all of the details for this week’s episode or you can listen to it immediately on , , , , or . Episode 11: Uncovering the Assault on President Trump with Congressman Devin Nunes In this week's edition of Making the Argument, Nick welcomes Congressmen Devin Nunes. As the Chairman of the House Intelligence Committee during the first two years of the Trump presidency, Congressman Nunes led the fight against the now debunked “Russian Collusion” hoax that has been pushed by Democrats from Abigail Spanberger to Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden. Congressman Nunes has continued to lead the fight through the Mueller investigation and impeachment circus. Check out Nick’s discussion with Congressman Nunes for a look behind the scenes of some of the pivotal moments in Congress in recent years and much more! You can listen or watch directly on and find links to subscribe on , , , , and more. Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc.

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: This moment.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
Black lives matter.

Black futures matter.

George Floyd, Breona Taylor, and Ahmaud Arbery's lives mattered.

We need to say their names, along with the names of the countless Black people who have been killed as a result of unnecessary and unlawful police violence. We must do more, however, then simply say their names.

We must also work towards demilitarizing law enforcement agencies that unjustly target Black people, Indigenous people, and people of color. That's why I proudly stand in support of the resolution presented by Rep. Ayanna Pressley, Rep. Ilhan Omar, Rep. Karen Bass, and Rep. Barbara Lee to condemn police brutality and call for substantive reforms.

Not only does this comprehensive resolution condemn police brutality, racial profiling, and excessive use of force, it also calls for the adoption of reforms and policies on all levels of government to end these injustices.

By following the link below, you can contact your Representative to urge them to co-sponsor this crucial piece of legislation>>

Now is the time for Congress to act. We must take concrete steps that will not only protect Black lives, but will also hold law enforcement officials accountable for their actions going forward.

If your Congressperson has already co-signed, please consider making a contribution to the Black Lives Matter Action Fund. Black Lives Matter is an organization at the forefront of the movement protesting police brutality and acts of violence against the Black community.

Stand with Black Lives Matter | Make a Donation>>

Thank you,

-- Linda Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

subject: An update on how Georgette is supporting racial justice and rebuilding trust in San Diego:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17791123/206691005/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRhZmUwOS1iZmE5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CKU4rmwbJI0DzNfjoEcVa-gPCTO_GRIGOtCPjxu77QA=&emci=7511528a-a9a9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=b54afe09-bfa9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)
Friend --

As our community and country grapples with generation-defining activism against racism in our criminal justice system, City Council President Georgette Gómez is delivering meaningful results:
* Last week, Georgette Gómez joined Mayor Kevin Faulconer, Councilwoman Monica Montgomery and San Diego Police Chief David Nisleit in announcing an **end to the Police Department's carotid restraint (chokehold) protocol.[Learn More >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17791124/206691006/-1642711819?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRhZmUwOS1iZmE5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CKU4rmwbJI0DzNfjoEcVa-gPCTO_GRIGOtCPjxu77QA=&emci=7511528a-a9a9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=b54afe09-bfa9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)**

* Georgette announced plans to move forward with a ballot measure to expand police oversight by creating an **Independent Police Practices Commission** which will review community complaints of police misconduct and recommend reforms. **[Learn More>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17791125/206691007/-202534222?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRhZmUwOS1iZmE5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CKU4rmwbJI0DzNfjoEcVa-gPCTO_GRIGOtCPjxu77QA=&emci=7511528a-a9a9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=b54afe09-bfa9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)**

* Georgette **successfully urged the National Guard to withdraw from San Diego** in order to reduce tensions and maintain calm. **[Learn More>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17791126/206691008/237704720?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRhZmUwOS1iZmE5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CKU4rmwbJI0DzNfjoEcVa-gPCTO_GRIGOtCPjxu77QA=&emci=7511528a-a9a9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=b54afe09-bfa9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)**

* Georgette **called for an immediate investigation** into a recorded incident wherein an undercover San Diego police officer allegedly threatened to kill, then arrested and shoved a protester into an unmarked van. **[Learn More>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17791127/206691009/-422905447?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRhZmUwOS1iZmE5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CKU4rmwbJI0DzNfjoEcVa-gPCTO_GRIGOtCPjxu77QA=&emci=7511528a-a9a9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=b54afe09-bfa9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)**

Georgette is working every day to keep San Diego safe while we rebuild trust between our communities and law enforcement. We'll keep you updated on Georgette's progress, but in the meantime, our campaign team needs your help:

**[Will you chip in to keep Georgette working for you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17791128/206691010/1147193815?refcode=em-06082020-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRhZmUwOS1iZmE5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CKU4rmwbJI0DzNfjoEcVa-gPCTO_GRIGOtCPjxu77QA=)**

Thank you for being a part of this team.

_Team Gómez_ **Georgette Gómez is not taking a dime from corporate PACs, and depends on grassroots contributions to take our shared progressive values to Congress. Will you pitch now to help her continue fighting for us?**
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17791129/206691011/1147193815?refcode=em-06082020-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRhZmUwOS1iZmE5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CKU4rmwbJI0DzNfjoEcVa-gPCTO_GRIGOtCPjxu77QA=)

subject: Wish my father a Happy Birthday

Friend,

My father has spent the last three and a half years working tirelessly to Keep America Great. His birthday is coming up on June 14th, and we’re putting together a birthday card with signatures from all of his loyal supporters.

Our goal is to collect 2 MILLION signatures from Patriots like YOU wishing him a ‘happy birthday,’ and we need your help.

Remember, this is his ONLY Official Birthday Card, and when you sign it, you can even leave him a personal note to read.

If you sign the card in the NEXT HOUR, I can guarantee you spot number #12 on the card.

Add your name to the President’s Official Birthday Card RIGHT NOW to secure your spot and to help us reach our goal of 2 MILLION signatures. >>

This card is the perfect opportunity for all of us to show our appreciation for all that President Trump has done for our country.

Hurry, we only have a few days left to reach our goal of 2 million signatures and I can only hold spot #12 for you for ONE HOUR. Don’t wait.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Best News Yet of 2020: Signs America’s Bouncing Back Fast
body:
Two and a half million jobs were added last month—the biggest jump in U.S. history. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=714c64440a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Best News Yet of 2020: Signs America’s Bouncing Back Fast**

America got some welcome news on Friday: “surprising, unprecedented job growth along with clear signs that the national pandemic has ebbed far from its peak,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.

Two and a half million jobs were added last month—the biggest jump in U.S. history.

“More grounds for hope: All indications are that the virus is losing.” In New York City, there were zero reported Coronavirus deaths one day this week, marking the first day without any deaths in nearly 3 months.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23e1b32d03&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “A majority of the Minneapolis City Council has pledged to ‘dismantle’ the city’s police department as their solution to police violence after George Floyd’s death.” The city council said they will defund the police and put the money toward a “community-based public safety model.” Read more from Henry Rodgers in [_The Daily Caller_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f2bfebf7a4&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Now is a terrible moment for _The New York Times_ —and for freedom of expression everywhere. “On Sunday afternoon, the _Times_ announced that James Bennet, its editorial page editor, would resign, and Jim Dao, his deputy, would be reassigned. Their crime: publishing an opinion piece from a United States senator _Times_ staffers and readers did not like,” former _Times_ reporter Alex Berenson writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d85095cba4&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Today, behind the cloak of a pandemic the Chinese Communist Party itself created, we are witnessing similar kinds of strategic behavior as China seeks to advance its own agenda and Chinese propagandists seek to advance a pro-authoritarian government narrative,” White House Trade & Manufacturing Policy Director Peter Navarro writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2bee617807&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4bd304d984&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8ffc7797b9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=95ab3f5d53)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

| | Friends,

**Today is the last day before the primary.** A year of hard work by many people comes down to the next 24 hours.

Thank you for all you’ve done for our campaign.
**ALL polling locations open from
7am to 7pm TOMORROW**
**GO VOTE!!**
We have two favors to ask:

_1) Will you call or text 5 friends to remind them about the election and ask them to vote for me tomorrow?_

_2) Can you chip in one last time in the primary to help us cross the finish line? _

We have TV, radio and digital ads running. We have volunteers to feed who are helping _all over the district today and tomorrow. _

All these things come with a price tag.

_**Can you to help us out one more time?**_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathy=20Tall?=
subject: Your weekly #TeamDani update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinos
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/95868238f723/your-weekly-teamdani-update?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello, to our amazing family of Dani for Illinois volunteers! You guys started June off with a BANG! Take a look at the incredible work you put in last week:
* You were able to reach out to over **5,260** people in the 16th district on the phone this week! That’s more people than can fit in the Palladium in Hollywood!
* Huge shout out to our MVP of the week, Madison N who made more than **500** of those calls alone!
* We sent more than **4,000** postcards to volunteer writers and finished the first cycle of our mail campaign but we’re not done with our mission to #SaveUSPS! Postcards will be back in July!
* We had our monthly Coordinated Organizations call last week! We got to check in with all the groups around the district to hear about the wonderful work being done by them. If you are part of an organization that would like to work with us to get Adam out of office, let me know - we’d love to add you to our call for June!

**A few reminders:**
* If you are interested in hosting a **Virtual House Party for Dani** , reach out to Marguerite at [marguerite@daniforillinois.com](mailto:marguerite@daniforillinois.com). We will walk you through it, and all you need to do is sit back with your happy hour drink of choice and invite your friends to do the same!
* While you’re still on the phone finishing phone banking, **CALL YOUR FRIENDS!** Everyone in your social circles has the potential to be an activist and volunteer right alongside you - you never know unless you ask!

**Volunteer Voice! ** The guest columnist this week is... Jenna M! _The biggest issue for me when making calls is realizing that there is a person on the end of the phone, someone who could judge you. The biggest tip I can give that I have been learning myself, is that that person will probably not meet you, and if they do they will never remember you._
Kathy Tall
Deputy Field Director
---

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Open for a sneak-peek at our new TV ad 👀
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wZLz6-dBP_UVNMAnCeuq3eov_FLExlfOnKqDzeEqM6s=/8TApCgJuQkUE4W83v8YrAXBwmYwFCbCMyxqMVT4OxnU=)

Peter,

On Friday, I shared some exciting news -- we were putting the finishing touches on a brand-new, 30-second television ad, and needed to raise $10,000 to debut it during Tuesday night's episode of The Rachel Maddow Show. Well, we've just finished the ad, and wanted to give all of our supporters a sneak-peek.

******[WATCH THE 15-SECOND TEASER AND DONATE!](https://act.myngp.com/el/wZLz6-dBP_UVNMAnCeuq3eov_FLExlfOnKqDzeEqM6s=/FWa8CaO_4tb6DvLdiEPQ0JVlOn9sWLilXQkBdnSejQc=)******

We're ready to share our message with Rachel's huge audience -- but we're still $4,000 short of what we need to get it on the air. **[Will you rush in a $200, $100, or $50 contribution so we can ensure that voters see this ad before they return their mail-in ballots?](https://act.myngp.com/el/wZLz6-dBP_UVNMAnCeuq3eov_FLExlfOnKqDzeEqM6s=/FWa8CaO_4tb6DvLdiEPQ0JVlOn9sWLilXQkBdnSejQc=)**

_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Exposing the FBI's Lies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
In the Senate, we are hearing a lot about the FBI's Muller investigations, which turned out to be a liberal attempt to remove President Trump Peter, In the Senate, we are hearing a lot about the FBI's investigation of the president, which turned out to be a liberal attempt to remove President Trump from office. Former Deputy Attorney General Rod Rosenstein admitted that he approved an application for a warrant for the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance (FISA) Court without even taking the time to read what it was for! **This warrant was used to****investigate****a sitting****president**. Last week, I discussed this topic with Fox News' Martha MacCallum. If you missed it, check out a clip from my interview by clicking the image below. [ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=bfc12f9a22b54794a8e67e467a1cac86&_e=W0Sdck3dDByGsZAosjRyDd_-7pd19FL_IDALs_X30uzFK0t9rHzUfFhACdGbkWR7_D9qr7oFMi-oApsrrtzWpYCSuxPoAgClXTvhPoOXmmZ7orXzNsqSFKtrbH47gwJ_fduF_idqvhqXglGAJltQf0FdlmsnUtpMd0sMedPcZyQU7MXE3Gyxmr43u_WZhMpELtHgF3Y4n3T7l7ENHZ8bNqN9OXdAkt4m85lAzsi6515Br-J7A3jVymqjU952T0De22VnehkZoG27M9uaPXJTJU9QyIBmTBrT3rwni5ePyNVf1hY4wze7Mrb6xKVCh7lxUHl63u7RsLXF68UobTVodt-CC6OAZTBuvwMy6K_4Rw7VqKqOmKL6G1GNvGzKNN_kmrb-X-H7AE-bX9x2PZ3_pWSSYNdrc1_lXZFMmNvGzAI%3D) | |
---
As your senator, part of my job is to be a check on unbridled power, to ensure that no government organization abuses the power given to them. **Here, we clearly see the FBI crossed the line, and without oversight, they might very well have gotten away with it**.

If we want to keep the deep state in check, **we must do our very best to hold the Senate so justice for these partisan crimes is effectively sought**.
[**Join Our Fight to Hold the Senate Today! >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=bfc12f9a22b54794a8e67e467a1cac86&_e=W0Sdck3dDByGsZAosjRyDd_-7pd19FL_IDALs_X30uzFK0t9rHzUfFhACdGbkWR7pW_JKHyM5wzkmy9bIho2n_GS1__277Q9bkQQ3y4FxDI-BZmuDEDHeXt2yA34Qq9hWWglGULUZBogm5Oi8BBZb9m6ZXRCUQq5LOExdBg1mpnQ-cbCk_CvW5iN0c2gHw-CSthrQV4l4Zc5WVDlVJzd9A2z80BrLmMOhnTdDlVz2Q5ehk0taOsy_SzPZFKQziU7ulUiE2-lFzsAxKqw5ShE-rCm5TTyq7VXGEQiXV-s1mClFVFCjAEwR_DdmwQh8gvmTxWnRVeIEO0OWFdCWtff0vAEa8bvlqXleQdfs_e6d8D0VB8FIz-7qVTWLMDdCaV14u5HUH38FkUuuUYO2sMzXhm1DS_skzCRIo6HKuiTh8U%3D)
So far, we have learned that individuals in the FBI were misleading. **They lied during a federal court investigation of a sitting U.S. president** , and Rod Rosenstein, then-acting Attorney General of the United States, approved of this investigation _without even reviewing the warrant application_!

To expose the liberals behind the ridiculous Russian collusion hoax, we must work together to keep the Senate Republican in November. **The partisan hacks****who attempted this coup against our president must be held accountable!**
[**Help us Keep the Senate RED**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=bfc12f9a22b54794a8e67e467a1cac86&_e=W0Sdck3dDByGsZAosjRyDd_-7pd19FL_IDALs_X30uzFK0t9rHzUfFhACdGbkWR7pW_JKHyM5wzkmy9bIho2n_GS1__277Q9bkQQ3y4FxDI-BZmuDEDHeXt2yA34Qq9hWWglGULUZBogm5Oi8BBZb9m6ZXRCUQq5LOExdBg1mpnQ-cbCk_CvW5iN0c2gHw-CSthrQV4l4Zc5WVDlVJzd9Pc5YW3GAU8nfoAj5RZTJpeM6TW8J3oR8dKa7_JM9taBx6RkORV1s3SZL4cn47ZxhxYql2NyUkfMrpn1sv3PYIn3YSVgVioz_7wKfYPcuRD8L_l6LnbHbBV1PN3gzN6Ayc1viWzOEWXVuFoiRmHglx581MULLoluvOCmmGclBhqU_5agw5SXqi2a4BaXugb9K5qw7-WMDYG7nrPiX8cDoUM%3D)
Thank you for standing with me. **We need support from more American patriots like you**.
Sincerely,

Josh Hawley
PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
If you no longer wish to receive emails, [use this link to be removed](http://email.hawleyformo.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_s=bfc12f9a22b54794a8e67e467a1cac86&_t=emrdlbCs3SpBltqKUFYrwKg-zdD6QJ4gDB8EwmynXn5AoOi51YmpziHZrg_FTkAPiRCdxq3HTvvj-jieoy0XbcCBLbevxQqPI-loJ2a_J44TR4-zzZCzca3G1dkPmO4ua1AF0XXirhvODFsX5rSOGQVa1ioh9oOCvXq3xdAuqzk%3D)

In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb75ad/4bd7760e/5df9434c/77ae6ad1/2316434495/VEsHAQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=14+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200608_1MO_none_none_STD_1_Webb&source=314_EM_FR_200608_1MO_none_none_STD_1_Webb")** to make a donation.

name: True the Vote
subject: Be not afraid. Vote.
body:
We can’t let up in our fight for free and fair elections. Read more >>
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=46A76A14A353)

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=46A76A14A366)
---
| | |
---
| | Friend,

Did you see Catherine’s email last week?

Eight states and Washington, D.C. held primary elections on Tuesday, June 2nd. It was a DISASTER. Chaos ruled the day in many of them... with ballot errors, voters across Baltimore didn't receive their mailed ballots, hours-long lines to vote in person even after the polls closed, and one week later...Philadelphia is still counting votes.

As Catherine has said before, this is ENGINEERED CHAOS. And it’s a preview of what the left wants to see happen across our great country on November 3rd.

They’re fostering electoral dysfunction nationwide, to throw open the door to fraud!

The left has always opposed enhancing election security.
Now, they’re exploiting the COVID-19 pandemic and social unrest to CONTROL election outcomes by pushing mail-in voting.
Tomorrow, six more states will hold primary elections – Georgia, Nevada, North Dakota, South Carolina, South Dakota, and West Virginia.

We’ll be closely monitoring how these elections play out.

With absentee ballot errors and far fewer polling locations, it’s safe to assume we can expect to see a repeat of the chaos that occurred last week.

If you happen to live in one of these states, and you’re looking for election information, you can find it by visiting our [True the Vote Resource Center](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=46A76A14A367). Click on your state to find details on when and where to vote. We’ve also provided your state’s Election Fraud Hotline, for reporting any abuses or potential fraud you might encounter.

We also hope every supporter will consider sustaining our work at this critical time.

We have a lot of work to do to share message with voters, prepare and file lawsuits to stop mail-in voting mayhem, and get a volunteer army of poll watchers in place.

[Follow this link to make a $5, $10, or $25 secure contribution, or more if you can](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=46A76A14A366).

Thank you for all your support, Friend.

Your involvement is crucial to our grassroots-driven nationwide effort to DEFEND free and fair elections in our great country.

Onward!

The True the Vote Team

---
| | [ Donate here >> ](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=46A76A14A366)

clean_body: Our pre-primary FEC deadline is approaching fast, and I need your help with a vital donation push before the June 10th deadline hits! Dear Peter, Our pre-primary FEC deadline is approaching fast, and I need your help with a vital donation push before the June 10th deadline hits! Join me to continue the fight to unseat Pelosi-pushover Kendra Horn and bring back the voice of the people to Oklahoma’s 5th District! Hitting this fundraising goal will get us one step closer to flipping CD-5 RED! Now is the time to show your support, as your donation TODAY will bring significant momentum for a victory come November. With the primary coming up on June 30th, it is imperative that we have all hands on deck! The success of our campaign depends on your support and commitment to bettering the representation of our district. All donations make a difference, no matter the amount , so please chip in whatever you can below. With your help today, we will be one step closer to fixing Congress by unseating Kendra Horn and getting rid of Nancy Pelosi for good. Thank you for your support. Sincerely, David Hill PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | | | | ---|---|---|---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Ayanna Pressley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
In the past two years, in communities across the Seventh District and in the halls of power in Washington, Ayanna Pressley has worked tirelessly to advocate and legislate for those who have been left | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852575c/45c30650/1c81206e4/66e9c850/1979730915/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
In 2018, Ayanna Pressley became a national superstar for winning a hard-fought House primary and becoming the first Black woman and first woman of color elected to represent Massachusetts in Congress.

But for years, she'd already been a superstar in Massachusetts, a dedicated public servant, and a fierce advocate for women, working families, and communities of color.

As she always says, the people closest to the pain should be closest to the power.

In the past two years, in communities across the Seventh District and in the halls of power in Washington, she's worked tirelessly to advocate and legislate for those who have been left out and left behind.

**[Ayanna Pressley's bold, principled leadership is now more important than ever-- and we need to send her back to Congress. If you can, will you split a contribution between Ayanna Pressley's campaign and Warren Democrats, so we can help make sure she's re-elected and elect more champions like her up and down the ballot?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852575c/45c30650/1c81206e4/66e9c853/1979730915/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWFwIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMwM0ZfQU5OX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNjA4X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-ap?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS03F_ANN_END_E_20200608_V1S1_P")**

I am honored to call Ayanna my sister, my dear friend, and my partner.

And I am so proud to fight alongside her in Congress to ensure critical protection for workers and families, to advance the work of racial and economic justice, and to hold this administration accountable.

**Ayanna Pressley's voice in Congress is indispensable, and I am so glad to have the opportunity to endorse her for re-election this November. Big, structural change can't wait, and she is just getting started.

[If you're able to, please chip in right now to support Ayanna Pressley and help elect Democrats like her who will fight for bold reform and put people first.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852575c/45c30650/1c81206e4/66e9c853/1979730915/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWFwIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMwM0ZfQU5OX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNjA4X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-ap?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS03F_ANN_END_E_20200608_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852575c/45c30650/1c81206e4/66e9c853/1979730915/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWFwIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMwM0ZfQU5OX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNjA4X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-ap?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS03F_ANN_END_E_20200608_V1S1_P")

Peter,
I can't begin to thank all of you for helping me become our nominee to keep this seat blue and be more ready than ever to win in November.
Our greatest asset in this race is all of you, which is why we are continuing to expand our volunteer program. We are bringing together volunteers and activists from across the district to get to know each other, talk campaign updates, strategize, and answer questions. **[Click here to join the volunteer team!](https://act.myngp.com/el/lCKGIsdHANwWUdVmti6RPxRuBZr3EReB56t184LgwO8=/n_MCe_ccpirM7kV8MTJuGewVsaT6_2AyZr1n5ThX7zk=)**
This race is still far from over, but we are reaching the milestones we need to win, and our team of grassroots supporters is growing. If you're ready to send a leader who listens to Iowa to Washington, **[volunteer for my campaign and make the difference today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/lCKGIsdHANwWUdVmti6RPxRuBZr3EReB56t184LgwO8=/n_MCe_ccpirM7kV8MTJuGewVsaT6_2AyZr1n5ThX7zk=)**

name: The First
subject: Bill O’Reilly is back!
body:
| | Watch him at 8p ET
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=TIi5AeGEPxdM94RMBE-ucn9vCtbEC2S2c8UgWo_eucxCo5s1aeLmptg04VvaqHeV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200608com01&n=1)
| Peter, Now more than ever it’s important that the First Amendment is protected. One of the most consistent defenders of the Constitution over that last two decades has been Bill O’Reilly. Not on Bill’s watch!
## No Agenda. No Cost. No Trials... No Spin News!
We encourage you to check it out right now. There are no gimmicks. No credits cards required. It’s completely, 100% FREE! Just click below to see all the ways you can watch Bill, and The First, every night at 8p ET. name: Congressman =?iso-8859-1?b?QW5kcuk=?= Carson
subject: Let's get to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | Hoosier Democrats – The 2020 election will be the most important election of our lives. The stakes could not be higher. In the White House, a President seeks to inflame divisions and refuses to examine the systemic racism that afflicts our country. That same President wasted precious time, compounding the impact of COVID-19. Too many lost loved ones and now families are facing unemployment levels not seen since the Great Depression. Health care. Public education. Paid sick leave. Voting rights. They are all on the ballot. We’re facing the fight of our lifetimes but Hoosier Democrats from around the state have stepped up and put their names on the ballot. They know when we lead with our values, we win. In these unprecedented times, we need voices at every level of government ready and willing to make progress. On June 12, Hoosier Democrats will come together for our Hoosier Hospitality Dinner – held virtually -- and recommit to building a better tomorrow. We’ll hear from my friend Congresswoman Cheri Bustos – Chair of the DCCC and tasked with protecting the House majority – on our path forward. Join us on June 12 and in this fight to build a better Indiana and a stronger, more just country. \--Congressman André Carson Get your virtual Hoosier Hospitality Dinner tickets _**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17794557/206774973/-1853952297?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDhiMjQ3Zi1lM2E5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=06kbVaiRLrVvNliXu10uCC032_zO8XTuU-Qw2FwSpDU=&emci=0f0231b6-c5a4-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&emdi=548b247f-e3a9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535)**_. |

name: Theresa Landrum
subject: I live in one of America's most polluted ZIP codes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Let's make them see us.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/308?t=2&akid=233%2E53494%2E6UrQiP) Friend, I've lived my entire life in one of America's most polluted ZIP codes: 48217, on the southwest side of Detroit. It's home to more than 8,000 people -- mostly Black -- and the only oil refinery in Michigan. My neighbors and I have been breathing in benzene, sulfur chloride, and hydrogen sulfide for years, and the health effects are clear. I've seen neighbors in their 20s die of cancer. I lost my mother and my father to cancer. I am a survivor. People of color across the country are being treated like we're disposable, while big polluters line their pockets with bailout dollars from Washington, D.C. And now, communities that have been exposed to decades of air pollution are more likely to suffer from COVID-19. That's why I supported Jay Inslee's presidential campaign last year and why I've since joined the advisory board of Evergreen Action. We have the most comprehensive plan for moving America to a clean energy economy -- one that centers environmental justice and was built by listening to frontline communities. That was a central tenet of the Inslee campaign, and now it's a central tenet of Evergreen Action. **[Watch and share Evergreen's launch video on Facebook to see what I mean.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/361?t=3&akid=233%2E53494%2E6UrQiP)** **[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/361?t=4&akid=233%2E53494%2E6UrQiP)** | [WATCH AND SHARE](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/361?t=5&akid=233%2E53494%2E6UrQiP)
---
Dirty energy companies have been wooing D.C. politicians for decades, and I'm under no illusions that getting Congress to embrace clean energy policies will be easy.
But there are more people suffering from pollution and the climate crisis than there are fossil fuel executives and lobbyists. Millions more. And the people in 48217 are no different from the people in 18326.
**Let's make our elected leaders see the people who pay the price for their corrupt bargains.**
**[Watch Evergreen's launch video, share it with your community, and get ready to make the Evergreen Action Plan a reality.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/361?t=6&akid=233%2E53494%2E6UrQiP)**
Thank you,
Theresa Landrum
Evergreen Advisory Board Member
[WATCH AND SHARE](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/361?t=7&akid=233%2E53494%2E6UrQiP)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=233%2E53494%2E6UrQiP). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---
