name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: ICYMI: President Trump, Rep. Matt Gaetz & more
body:
Check out these clips from last week on Spicer&Co

http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Feepurl.com%2Fg6vm3L&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193 Share (http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Feepurl.com%2Fg6vm3L&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193)
http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d3ef6b07f9&e=f6564bbe3b Forward (http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d3ef6b07f9&e=f6564bbe3b)

** Don't Miss These Clips From Last Week!
------------------------------------------------------------
I added a poll of the week question below- check it out!

We've got some great segments from last week on Spicer&Co. I sat down exclusively with President Trump (https://youtu.be/UDnIJb_J9mI?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) and covered everything from the murder of George Floyd to his Executive Order on social media and more- you don't want to miss it, check it out below. Trish Regan (https://youtu.be/McJYnsRfZLU?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) joined us to talk about the latest example of liberal media bias in covering Senator Tom Cotton's op-ed in the New York Times, watch our segment with Trish here (https://youtu.be/McJYnsRfZLU?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) . Congressman Matt Gaetz (https://youtu.be/OgsYJgWH25Y?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) and Congressman Lee Zeldin (https://youtu.be/pd6Juz1uEbM?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) joined us to discuss the latest corruption within the DOJ and Rod Rosenstein's testimony. Check out each of the segments on my YouTube page (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFEzUWbuym-nBZUSFkvJf4w?view_as=subscriber&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) .

Make sure you subscribe to my YouTube channel (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFEzUWbuym-nBZUSFkvJf4w?view_as=subscriber&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) to stay up to date on all the great segments from "Spicer&Co".

“Spicer&Co” is back every night this week at 6p and 9p on Newsmax, this week we will be joined by Secretary of the HUD Ben Carson, Congressman Lee Zeldin, Trish Regan and more. I hope you'll set your DVR and tune in! Find your channel here (https://seanspicer.com/spicer-co/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) .

https://youtu.be/UDnIJb_J9mI?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193
My exclusive sit down with President Trump from Wednesday, June 3, 2020.

Check out this week's poll on my website -

Should politicians/elected officials who support “Defund the Police” give up their own security detail?

Weigh in here (http://seanspicer.com/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) !

** Leading America
------------------------------------------------------------

In my second book "Leading America", I take a deep dive into my journey on Dancing with the Stars and some of my experiences with the media, education, big tech and corporate America since leaving the White House. Its even more clear to me now that President Trump's policies are what we need to move our country forward.

It comes out October 13, 2020, but you can pre-order on Amazon now.

Pre-order it now here (https://www.amazon.com/Leading-America-Commitment-Patriotism-Capitalism-ebook/dp/B084MDY19D/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=leading+america&qid=1588613239&sr=8-1&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) !

Help Support the Fight Against Pancreatic Cancer
This month I've teamed up with Cameo (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) , an app that creates personalized shoutouts for birthdays, anniversaries, etc. to raise money for The Pancreatic Cancer Action Network. (https://www.pancan.org/get-involved/pancreatic-cancer-awareness/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193)

In 2016 I lost my father to pancreatic cancer (https://seanspicer.com/giving-back/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) , so supporting PanCan in their fight for a cure is a cause close to my family. For the last several years I've captained a team to walk in the annual PurpleStride 5k, but this year because of coronavirus the walk will be virtual. So instead you can get a Cameo (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) shoutout from me and the proceeds will go to my team for the virtual walk on June 13th. Find my team here (https://secure.pancan.org/site/TR/PurpleStride/PurpleStride?team_id=26655&pg=team&fr_id=1942&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) !

Check out Cameo here (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) and learn more about PanCan here (https://secure.pancan.org/site/TR/PurpleStride/PurpleStride?team_id=26655&pg=team&fr_id=1942&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d3ef6b07f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_08_05_59&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d3ef6b07f9-68212193) .

Thanks,

Sean

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kansans=20for=20LaTurner?=
subject: $400k of taxpayer-funded campaign ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Over the past 6 months, Steve Watkins has spent over $400,000 of YOUR money on campaign ads for himself! This is a gross abuse of taxpayer funds! | |
---
| | | Enough is enough. Over the past 6 months, **Steve Watkins has spent over $400,000 of YOUR money on campaign ads for himself!** He has spent more than twice what the rest of the Kansans in Congress spent combined. This is a gross abuse of taxpayer funds! _This doesn’t even include the ads he's running on radio AS WE SPEAK, using Nancy Pelosi’s newest loophole to try to preserve her House majority_. See for yourself [here](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=173d3ae324&e=1050d051da).
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=27b90d02d2&e=1050d051da)
---
| He is clearly not getting the message that Kansans don't want him **_selfishly spending their hard-earned tax dollars on political ads_** posed as public service announcements.
---
| [Sign the Petition Stop Taxpayer Funded Campaign Ads!](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9cc3d952cf&e=1050d051da "Sign the Petition Stop Taxpayer Funded Campaign Ads!")
---
| Not only has Watkins spent nearly half a million dollars on these taxpayer-funded ads, but _**he is currently exploiting a Nancy Pelosi-sanctioned loophole allowing him to use YOUR money on self-promoting ads during the congressional blackout period.**_ That money was intended to provide messages that protect the health and safety of our seniors and first responders, but Watkins felt it would be better used to run political ads about himself.

This is a blatant disregard for the appropriate use of taxpayer funds. **We need a congressman who respects the law and your taxpayer dollars** and has a history of fiscally responsible behavior.

Jake LaTurner will be a diligent protector of your hard-earned money by putting it to work for you where it can do the most good. Help us get Jake elected to Congress so we can send a real, trustworthy conservative to Washington, D.C.
---
| [Donate to send a Trusted Conservative to Congress!](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ba85ec8b01&e=1050d051da "Donate to send a Trusted Conservative to Congress!")
---
| Yours in the fight!

Team LaTurner
---
| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9a5a9bca51&e=1050d051da)
---
| | [](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5abf5409fd&e=1050d051da)
---
| | [](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9030df8b98&e=1050d051da)
---
| | [](jakelaturner.com)
---

P.O. Box 67237

name: NEW DEVELOPMENT >> from UNITEDemocrats
subject: BREAKING: Trump's Attorney General ordered the attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
We're truly sickened, Peter.

| Peter -- We're truly SICKENED by Trump's Attorney General, William Barr.

First, **Barr declared Trump completely INNOCENT** before the Mueller Report was public.

Then, **Barr followed Trump's commands** and launched a cruel investigation into brave FBI agents who dared to prosecute Trump's supporter, Michael Flynn.

And now, we've just found out that **_it was actually Barr_ who ordered that police shoot rubber bullets and tear-gas** at peaceful protesters outside the White House! [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17794687/206778764/-1924412461?refcode=VC_UD_20200608_EMDF_E1_T0-S0SL0C0_AC_Barr-CNN&amount=10&amounts=3,10,25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmYzU1MjJkLWU1YTktZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r15_R9dMlkLcyTJ6fZAa084kP5qFn59yVj6wYIfDzfQ=) Let's be totally honest: [**The only reason that Trump has avoided PRISON this far into his corrupt presidency is because AG Barr is protecting him and PERVERTING the law to help Trump!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17794688/206778765/-1924412461?refcode=VC_UD_20200608_EMDF_E1_T0-S0SL0C0_AC_Barr-CNN&amount=10&amounts=3,10,25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmYzU1MjJkLWU1YTktZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r15_R9dMlkLcyTJ6fZAa084kP5qFn59yVj6wYIfDzfQ=)

We need to do everything we possibly can to make 100% sure that Trump loses in November, and takes AG Barr down with him!

[**We're going to run persuasive Internet ads to take down Trump and his ENTIRE corrupt Cabinet -- including AG Barr!! Will you help us create new ads based on this news? We need to raise $4,330 to make it possible. Even $3 goes a long way to punishing Trump and Barr! >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17794689/206778766/-1924412461?refcode=VC_UD_20200608_EMDF_E1_T0-S0SL0C0_AC_Barr-CNN&amount=3&amounts=3,10,25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmYzU1MjJkLWU1YTktZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r15_R9dMlkLcyTJ6fZAa084kP5qFn59yVj6wYIfDzfQ=) | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17794695/206778772/-1924412461?refcode=VC_UD_20200608_EMDF_E1_T0-S0SL0C0_AC_Barr-CNN&amount=3&amounts=3,10,25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmYzU1MjJkLWU1YTktZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r15_R9dMlkLcyTJ6fZAa084kP5qFn59yVj6wYIfDzfQ=)

We ask a lot from you guys, and we want to know that we are here to listen to your concerns — both big and small.

We wanted to give you a chance to let us know how you’re feeling about the economy, our state, COVID-19, the recent protests across America and Indiana, or anything else that’s on your mind.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: COVID-19 tests for workers - even those without symptoms
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
For months, Rhode Island has been a national - and global - leader in testing, and that continues to be true today. We still have the highest rate of testing per capita of any state--and a higher rate than most countries. As of today, we've tested about 15% of our population. For comparison, the national average is below 5.5%.
We became a leader in testing because we were innovative, we worked hard, and we refused to take no for an answer. But we're going to stay a leader by testing smarter, not just harder. Last month, I laid out our comprehensive, three-part testing strategy: We're going to rapidly test all symptomatic people, we're going to react quickly to an outbreak, and we're going to create an early warning system by testing key groups of asymptomatic individuals.
The data we get from our early warning system will help us determine how many people may have coronavirus without showing any symptoms, helping us further refine guidelines for industries and build better models and projections. The good news is that this work is already ongoing - but for our early warning system to be effective, we need it to be more robust. Here's how we can do that:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013p5uAnIG3x7_tnvfYY9v9Kv59mXH2FQOe30nszbmQCdN7Njc_zn6__PdyeZTNgTsvX1AoDCpdSbnoquD2WOL2EesoAkumN6BrVuoTHVYGDYYJ8Hk9Aq60FtJ7o4VCamic9OeyR7Xi1o7BO7HDaKawuTUtW3z3SiwzXzZo5d-M2XPue8PCeuzrTqGa6R6g27IMXEh_Oi2JHH11XxE5EE1cTGcu9KMFFVg&c=QagbCttYXHQCq_NUEQH7DgXwuHmkboNsm_r7xuwKbMALcglbznb5vw==&ch=AS-LhF1NqWQriQG5DfsnDKYoIq7yd-wrBB_qC3Jl2sr_8QhSipzEsg==)
---
| Starting today, close contact workers at hair salons, barber shops, nail salons, gyms, tattoo, massage and tanning parlors will be able to schedule a free test at our National Guard testing sites. We're also opening this asymptomatic, free testing option to education workers, starting today with child care employees.
If you fall into one of these categories, you can get tested by going to [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013p5uAnIG3x7_tnvfYY9v9Kv59mXH2FQOe30nszbmQCdN7Njc_zn6__PdyeZTNgTsfqtXi9lA3BGJixMJ3xZyChw2pShI4sK5aDIEM0N0OWAAnVldNLeHyVeTE99kW920240RzBs64F0=&c=QagbCttYXHQCq_NUEQH7DgXwuHmkboNsm_r7xuwKbMALcglbznb5vw==&ch=AS-LhF1NqWQriQG5DfsnDKYoIq7yd-wrBB_qC3Jl2sr_8QhSipzEsg==) or calling the Department of Health at 222-8022. To be clear, this is for people without symptoms. If you have symptoms, you should call your primary care physician or community health center and get tested as soon as possible.
We fully expect to add more groups to our asymptomatic testing program as time goes on. We're also going to prioritize testing communities of color in everything that we do, particularly in high-density communities like Central Falls and Pawtucket.
In addition to these populations, we also want to know what's happening after people have been in large groups exercising their constitutionally-protected right to protest. Along with the populations we just discussed, anyone who has been in a gathering at a protest can get tested without symptoms starting today. This is what the CDC is recommending to people in every state who have participated in a protest. You can schedule a test the same way--by going to [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013p5uAnIG3x7_tnvfYY9v9Kv59mXH2FQOe30nszbmQCdN7Njc_zn6__PdyeZTNgTsfqtXi9lA3BGJixMJ3xZyChw2pShI4sK5aDIEM0N0OWAAnVldNLeHyVeTE99kW920240RzBs64F0=&c=QagbCttYXHQCq_NUEQH7DgXwuHmkboNsm_r7xuwKbMALcglbznb5vw==&ch=AS-LhF1NqWQriQG5DfsnDKYoIq7yd-wrBB_qC3Jl2sr_8QhSipzEsg==) or calling the Department of Health at 222-8022.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013p5uAnIG3x7_tnvfYY9v9Kv59mXH2FQOe30nszbmQCdN7Njc_zn6_5aFAjul88t-7AlqogypPvkuX1JlUjuWxvTxSITAgS5x00shafHXwqvvhH4RGhPnZo_4_P9faYvDZNy2SzcbIlLWetG1SRYWROZR31Ggko0HgifPO4pn8LEBYrDi38mfSV7t-gUxLudAtr_9Cl9Mz-k=&c=QagbCttYXHQCq_NUEQH7DgXwuHmkboNsm_r7xuwKbMALcglbznb5vw==&ch=AS-LhF1NqWQriQG5DfsnDKYoIq7yd-wrBB_qC3Jl2sr_8QhSipzEsg==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013p5uAnIG3x7_tnvfYY9v9Kv59mXH2FQOe30nszbmQCdN7Njc_zn6_5aFAjul88t-7AlqogypPvkuX1JlUjuWxvTxSITAgS5x00shafHXwqvvhH4RGhPnZo_4_P9faYvDZNy2SzcbIlLWetG1SRYWROZR31Ggko0HgifPO4pn8LEBYrDi38mfSV7t-gUxLudAtr_9Cl9Mz-k=&c=QagbCttYXHQCq_NUEQH7DgXwuHmkboNsm_r7xuwKbMALcglbznb5vw==&ch=AS-LhF1NqWQriQG5DfsnDKYoIq7yd-wrBB_qC3Jl2sr_8QhSipzEsg==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| I want to be absolutely clear: you should not interpret this policy as permission to attend large social gatherings. Do not throw a party thinking that you can just get tested after. You should still be limiting your face-to-face contact with 15 people or fewer in Phase 2. That said, if you have recently attended a large protest, we're encouraging you to go get tested. Your early action could help save the lives of people around you.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013p5uAnIG3x7_tnvfYY9v9Kv59mXH2FQOe30nszbmQCdN7Njc_zn6__PdyeZTNgTs78xClBt66Jl_qStq7E09vwhd7yaiq2sxXgEOeVqlBz9WexGZe7OuKubmQ3mYdzDNuf3fdybyF6hC0zBLIZ9RKWN42bKyETzMZyB25Esyebp1uCRlJCV0qXvm9Q1UMJufrM_SWfpY8mgxqEbUJmSOs3rR83Kt_dmxprNuyZ9vlpRQsxCuwod6rnf7Td8vv-CMLriSRizKcnf2B3TNqWAphiY4V0dN3c8iqWVvfjPA_80Dk9bIfy3j7zKNGZ-Us-VBNH46D64Tvcc=&c=QagbCttYXHQCq_NUEQH7DgXwuHmkboNsm_r7xuwKbMALcglbznb5vw==&ch=AS-LhF1NqWQriQG5DfsnDKYoIq7yd-wrBB_qC3Jl2sr_8QhSipzEsg==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903

---

Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with

In addition to these populations, we also want to know what's happening after people have been in large groups exercising their constitutionally-protected right to protest. Along with the populations we just discussed, anyone who has been in a gathering at a protest can get tested without symptoms starting today. This is what the CDC is recommending to people in every state who have participated in a protest. You can schedule a test the same way--by going to == or calling the Department of Health at 222-8022. | == | To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's == for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island. | I want to be absolutely clear: you should not interpret this policy as permission to attend large social gatherings. Do not throw a party thinking that you can just get tested after. You should still be limiting your face-to-face contact with 15 people or fewer in Phase 2. That said, if you have recently attended a large protest, we're encouraging you to go get tested. Your early action could help save the lives of people around you. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov in collaboration with |

name: Tina Smith
subject: A transformative change in policing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Friend — This morning, House and Senate Democrats announced a new bill that could bring transformative change in policing. I am proud to join the Congressional Black Caucus, the House Judiciary Committee, and Senators Cory Booker and Kamala Harris in helping introduce this critical piece of legislation. **[Now, I am calling on Mitch McConnell to allow this bill to the floor for a vote. But, I need your help to send a powerful message to Washington. Can you sign my petition to demand this bill gets heard on the Senate floor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17794945/206792616/-665349163?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDRmODdjYi1lY2E5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KPPsxeQ3bl6S2CzgprQI3YV_-BU-7xrUvCCurj9tQkQ=&emci=945e5c6f-d3a9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=c04f87cb-eca9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=6227932)** | [SIGN MY PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17794946/206792617/-665349163?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDRmODdjYi1lY2E5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KPPsxeQ3bl6S2CzgprQI3YV_-BU-7xrUvCCurj9tQkQ=&emci=945e5c6f-d3a9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=c04f87cb-eca9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=6227932)
---
Our work is to root out the culture of racism and abuse of power at the heart of a system that allows the Black community and so many other marginalized communities to be killed, abused, and harassed by law enforcement over and over again.
The bill includes the following changes to police policy:
* Create a federal registry for police misconduct and require states to report use of force to the Department of Justice;

* Ban chokeholds and carotid holds and only allocate funding to state and local jurisdictions that end these practices;

* End the use of “no-knock” warrants that often lead to deadly use of force by officers and make funding contingent on ending the use of these warrants;

* Give state attorneys general the power to hold police accountable for eliminating the culture of racism and violence in their departments, and to conduct independent investigations of the use of force;

* Enact mandatory racial and implicit bias training for police officers and condition federal funding to departments based on them providing this training;

* Strictly limit the transfer of military-grade weaponry to police departments;

* Make lynching a federal hate crime;

* And changes “qualified immunity” to make it easier for people to be able to sue police officers for civil rights violations.

The Justice in Policing Act of 2020 is a good and important start in enacting much-needed change to federal policy around policing. We need to pass this legislation in both the House and the Senate — and we’ll need your help to do so.
**[The protests of the last few weeks have made it clear that Americans are demanding change and accountability now. Can you make your voice heard and sign my petition right now? It is so important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17794947/206792618/-665349163?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDRmODdjYi1lY2E5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KPPsxeQ3bl6S2CzgprQI3YV_-BU-7xrUvCCurj9tQkQ=&emci=945e5c6f-d3a9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=c04f87cb-eca9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=6227932)**
[SIGN MY PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17794948/206792619/-665349163?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDRmODdjYi1lY2E5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KPPsxeQ3bl6S2CzgprQI3YV_-BU-7xrUvCCurj9tQkQ=&emci=945e5c6f-d3a9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=c04f87cb-eca9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=6227932)
---
I know this bill is just the beginning. But I think it’s a very important first step. We have a lot of work to do, and I am more committed than ever to this fight.
Thank you for consistently taking action. I am proud to have you on this team.
— Tina
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
---
Tina Smith for Minnesota
PO Box 14362
St. Paul, MN 55114
United States

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: we could lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Folks --
Our campaign's pre-primary FEC deadline is less than a week away. This is the most important deadline our campaign has faced yet. It's the last time our numbers become public before the general election begins. That's why Senator Hassan said I should reach out.
**If we come up short of our goal, we could lose this race.** Republican groups with ties to Mitch McConnell just announced a new multi-million dollar ad blitz attacking our campaign -- meaning the GOP is now planning to outspend us nearly 3:1! Yeesh!
Republicans will be poring over our report for any sign of weakness. If they think our team is weak or ripe for the taking, they'll flood our state with even more attacks to save Mitch McConnell's Senate majority. We cannot let that happen.
Let me be clear, whether we have the resources to build our campaign strong enough to fight back against the GOP depends on how we respond right now.
**We need to raise $100,000 before our pre-primary FEC deadline to combat this new influx of GOP attacks.[If you can, will you split a donation between my campaign and Senator Hassan's to help us build a campaign strong enough to flip Colorado's Senate seat?](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc471/2a380d31/23b48a9a/f09510/1185862132/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA2MDhfTVdINEpIX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200608_MWH4JH_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**

name: Bennet HQ
subject: [SIGNATURE NEEDED] Pass the Justice in Policing Act >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000]
Team:
Today, Michael announced he is joining Senators Cory Booker and Kamala Harris in introducing the Justice in Policing Act – what is set to be the most comprehensive police reform legislation in history.
This is a critical step in dismantling centuries of systemic oppression and racism in our country – and it’s a step we need to take now. [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/justice-in-policing-act/?source=EM_FR_B1_060820_NATL]
The bill focuses on four reforms: *
Holding
police
accountable
in
our
courts
*
Increasing
transparency
through
new
methods
of
data
collection
and
reporting
*
Improving
police
training
and
practices
*
Making
lynching
a
federal
crime
In order for law enforcement to receive federal funding, they will need to comply with these reforms. That means officers will be required to wear body cameras, complete training on racial discrimination and profiling, and be banned from employing practices like chokeholds.
This is a bold, ambitious plan to seek racial justice and equal protection under the law for the black community. Michael is ready to take action with Cory and Kamala to fight for its passage. Will you join them? [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/justice-in-policing-act/?source=EM_FR_B1_060820_NATL]
The time for meaningful, structural change is here – and we need to gather as much support as possible. If you’re ready for nation-wide police reform, add your name: [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/justice-in-policing-act/?source=EM_FR_B1_060820_NATL]

ADD MY NAME >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/justice-in-policing-act/?source=EM_FR_B1_060820_NATL]

For more information on the Justice in Policing Act, click here [https://www.vox.com/2020/6/8/21283841/democrats-police-reform-bill-explained-george-floyd] .
Thank you,
Bennet HQ
Thank you for being a part of Michael’s re-election campaign!
Sending emails is a crucial way to keep supporters like you updated on what Michael is doing in Colorado and Washington D.C. to fight for progress in a purple state. Plus, this campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you! Will you chip in today to join Michael in the fight for a better tomorrow? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000]

name: NPR Alert
subject: Loeffler (R) is "fighting for her political life"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
This race is making headlines:
| | |

name: Mark Warner
subject: making real, structural change.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The Justice in Policing Act
|
---
| | Derek --

Today, I co-sponsored the Justice in Policing Act of 2020 with 34 of my Senate colleagues, led by Senators Kamala Harris and Cory Booker.

This bill makes common-sense changes to hold police officers who break the law accountable, address unchecked bias, change the culture of law enforcement, and lay the groundwork for trust between law enforcement and our communities.

Black lives matter. As a United States Senator, it's my duty to take action that will result in meaningful structural change.

**Here is what the Justice in Policing Act will do:**
* Create a national standard for use of force;
* Ban neck holds, chokeholds, and similar excessive force tactics;
* Ban no-knock warrants;
* Require the use of body cams for police;
* Require local police departments to send data on the use of force to the federal government;
* Reform racial profiling training for police officers;
* Create a grant program that would allow state attorneys general to create an independent process to investigate misconduct or excessive use of force; and
* Limit qualified immunity, making it easier to hold police officers who violate the law accountable for their actions.

There is no singular policy solution to correct years of overpolicing and systemic racism. The Justice in Policing Act is our first step toward concrete reforms.

Thank you for your support.

-- Mark Warner

---
|
---

| [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d457/53d9897e/54809389/1c887cbb/1629453281/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=email-footer-img&refcode2=cont&amount=10") **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d457/53d9897e/54809389/1c887cba/1629453281/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=email-footer-db&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**

clean_body: Marsha Blackburn and Bill Hagerty think so. | "" | | Unbelievable: Two state lawmakers -- who don't even live in or represent Nashville -- are pushing for Nashville to host the Republican National Convention despite the fact that COVID-19 is still devastating our capital and our entire state. Our opponent Bill Hagerty and Sen. Marsha Blackburn want to host the RNC in Nashville, too. They care more about appeasing their Washington insider friends than protecting Tennesseans! This is about the health and safety of Tennesseans. The truth is we can't have a healthy economy without healthy people \-- and that's why bringing an event like this to Nashville at the last minute raises alarm bells after we've all sacrificed so much to flatten the curve. "" | "" | | "" ---|---|--- Thanks, Team Mackler | | | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Finance Update (via ChristyForCongress.org)
subject: Can you help hit this small goal by midnight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Quick fundraising update: We want to raise $5,000 by TONIGHT to shore up our field budget for the rest of June.

This moment is a crucial time for us to be raising money in our effort to defeat Mike Garcia this November and elect Christy Smith, who will stand up for her constituents, not corporate interests. We're less than a month after the special election, and we need to keep up the momentum we've built to flip this seat.

**We have to elect the right leaders this fall. We have the chance to do so in CA-25 -- but we need your help now to make it happen.**

**[Pitch in $5 or anything you can to help meet this critical fundraising goal!](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb82/29776869/9b25601/569f30e9/689075787/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MDhfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200608_newgoal-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb82/29776869/9b25601/569f30ea/689075787/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MDhfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200608_newgoal-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb82/29776869/9b25601/569f30eb/689075787/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MDhfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200608_newgoal-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb82/29776869/9b25601/569f30e4/689075787/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MDhfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200608_newgoal-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb82/29776869/9b25601/569f30e5/689075787/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MDhfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200608_newgoal-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb82/29776869/9b25601/569f30e6/689075787/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MDhfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200608_newgoal-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb82/29776869/9b25601/569f30e9/689075787/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MDhfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200608_newgoal-full")
The more voter outreach we can do this summer, the better our chances of flipping this seat this fall.

We can't afford to have Mike Garcia as our representative in Congress next year. We've seen a glimpse of what he's like in Congress in just a few short weeks: an instant vote for anything Trump and/or his corporate interests support.

Our neighbors in CA-25 deserve better -- they deserve a leader like Christy Smith.

**[So what do you say, can you chip in $5 right now to help meet our $5,000 goal?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb82/29776869/9b25601/569f30e9/689075787/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MDhfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200608_newgoal-full")**

Thanks for stepping up when we need you.

\-- The Finance Team

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb82/29776869/9b25601/569f30e9/689075787/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MDhfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200608_newgoal-full")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb82/29776869/9b25601/569f30e9/689075787/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MDhfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200608_newgoal-full")
